_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_27_note: Session 27 (2026-05-27): MRVL event-driven deep session — Q1 FY2027 earnings reported post-close today. Stock surged 13–15% in after-hours per TIKR/Stocktwits; actual Q1 revenue/EPS/Q2 guidance not yet indexed (conference call at 1:45 PM PT, replay available June 2 passcode 13760544). DCF re-run: IV $119.30 (MoS -42.2%, SELL/AVOID). Major entity gap filled: XConn Technologies ($540M acquisition, completed Feb 10, 2026) — PCIe 5/CXL 2.0 in production, PCIe 6/CXL 3.1 sampling — was entirely absent from 26 prior sessions. XConn directly competes with Astera Labs Scorpio X. ALAB Northland downgrade to Market Perform (no PT) added. CoWoS concept updated with TSMC 4× expansion ($56B capex, 35K→130K WPM). Phases 1b/1c gated (27%6=3). Session 28 ABSOLUTE PRIORITY: (1) Capture MRVL Q1 FY2027 actual revenue vs. $2.40B guide, EPS vs. $0.79, Q2 FY2027 guidance, FY2027 full-year guidance (was ~$11B); (2) Update MRVL.json TTM revenue; (3) Re-run DCF if guide materially raised; (4) Computex June 1-5 — NVDA Jensen keynote Jun 1, MRVL Murphy Jun 2, ALAB Scorpio X demo Jun 2-5.

event_queue.event: Q1 FY2027 actual numbers not yet indexed. Stock surged 13-15% AH on beat. Session 28: capture actual Q1 revenue/EPS/Q2 guidance from press release or indexing. Update MRVL.json TTM revenue and re-run DCF if Q2 guidance materially raised above $2.60B or FY2027 raised above $11.5B.

Computex June 1 (Mon) Jensen Huang keynote at 11am Taipei time. Key signals: Vera Rubin production timeline (2M→1.5M cut from HBM4 shortage — confirm or revise), CoWoS-L allocation, Rubin ship date. Session 28 or 29: update NVDA entity.

Northland downgrade to Market Perform (May 26, no PT, from $225 Outperform). Computex June 2-5 Scorpio X demo vs. MRVL XConn PCIe 6 switch — first head-to-head. Session 28/29: update ALAB entity after Computex. No DCF re-run until Computex outcome known.

price +3.19% to $158.68 on May 26 (actual confirmed close; prior sessions used stale $137.53). MoS corrected to -20.0% → SELL/AVOID. DCF last run May 22 (<30 days). No re-run required; price correction captured in dashboard.
